title: Biology AI Training Expert
description: Create high-quality STEM training data for frontier AI models. Design challenging biology problems with verifiable answers. Requires biology degree, Python, computational biology experience. Part-time 20hrs/week, up to 40 USD/hr, 2 months with extension.
match_reasons: MSc in Bioinformatics and Systems Biology|Strong Python and bioinformatics workflows|Research experience at DTU HealthTech and Novo Nordisk with 2 publications|Cross-disciplinary biology and computation
gaps: No PhD|No experience designing AI training problems
